_metadata.description: US-listed crypto ETF universe. Curated seed kept in sync with SEC EDGAR daily scanner output. Covers spot (BTC/ETH/altcoin), futures (BTC/ETH), leveraged, covered-call income, thematic equity baskets, multi-asset wrappers, and defined-outcome buffered products. Source inventory: Q1 2026 research + evening 2026-04-22 competitive audit.
_metadata.last_expansion_note: v3 deep-walk: ETFdb + Defiance full lineup + Roundhill income + Simplify + GSR + 2026 altcoin launches. 51 more ETFs added.
